message:
fix: eliminate stale smoke artifacts causing false FAILs (bd-k5q5.2.10)

overall_status() now ignores smoke-only failures when scenario results
exist, since scenarios are more authoritative (newer). This fixes false
FAIL for dynamic-resources, git-checkpoint, and status-line which had
stale smoke artifacts from prior runs.

Pass rate: 95.0% -> 100.0% (60/60 official extensions pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
